headline: Crypto Weekly: Robinhood disappoints, Trump hosts meme coin winners
summary: STORY: From falling shares at Robinhood to Trump hosting crypto contest winners... This is Crypto Weekly:: Crypto Weekly:: Robinhood shares fallRobinhood's shares plunged 10%, as crypto-driven market volatility dampened its first-quarter trading volume growth....leading the trading platform to miss estimates for profit and revenue.Crypto markets have come under pressure this year...with bitcoin down more than 30% in the last six months, as a broad risk-off mood took hold.:: Cambodian senator's 'crypto-romance scams'The U.S. government imposed sanctions on Kok An, a wealthy Cambodian senator and ally of Cambodian Senate President Hun Sen.It said he, as well as 28 individuals and entities, had stolen millions of dollars from U.S. citizens using crypto-romance schemes.The U.S. Treasury Department said Kok An used his political connections to protect a network of scam centers and various operators.:: US sanctions 'wallets' tied to Iran The U.S. Treasury Department is sanctioning multiple wallets tied to Iran...and freezing $344 million in cryptocurrency.Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced the move in a statement on X.It's part of an ongoing effort by the Trump administration to cut off funding sources to the Iranian government.:: Trump hosts crypto contest winnersU.S. President Donald Trump hosted winners of his second annual meme coin contest at his Mar-a-Lago club in Palm Beach, Florida.He offered top buyers of his $TRUMP cryptocurrency an audience with him...even as the token's value has plunged more than 95% from its peak last year.It comes as scrutiny of the Trump family’s broader crypto ventures has intensified, with Democratic leaders calling for investigations.

raw.headline: Crypto Weekly: Robinhood disappoints, Trump hosts meme coin winners
raw.summary: STORY: From falling shares at Robinhood to Trump hosting crypto contest winners... This is Crypto Weekly:: Crypto Weekly:: Robinhood shares fallRobinhood's shares plunged 10%, as crypto-driven market volatility dampened its first-quarter trading volume growth....leading the trading platform to miss estimates for profit and revenue.Crypto markets have come under pressure this year...with bitcoin down more than 30% in the last six months, as a broad risk-off mood took hold.:: Cambodian senator's 'crypto-romance scams'The U.S. government imposed sanctions on Kok An, a wealthy Cambodian senator and ally of Cambodian Senate President Hun Sen.It said he, as well as 28 individuals and entities, had stolen millions of dollars from U.S. citizens using crypto-romance schemes.The U.S. Treasury Department said Kok An used his political connections to protect a network of scam centers and various operators.:: US sanctions 'wallets' tied to Iran The U.S. Treasury Department is sanctioning multiple wallets tied to Iran...and freezing $344 million in cryptocurrency.Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced the move in a statement on X.It's part of an ongoing effort by the Trump administration to cut off funding sources to the Iranian government.:: Trump hosts crypto contest winnersU.S. President Donald Trump hosted winners of his second annual meme coin contest at his Mar-a-Lago club in Palm Beach, Florida.He offered top buyers of his $TRUMP cryptocurrency an audience with him...even as the token's value has plunged more than 95% from its peak last year.It comes as scrutiny of the Trump family’s broader crypto ventures has intensified, with Democratic leaders calling for investigations.
